_meta.description: Finance answer style bank for analyst-grade response behavior.

styleRules.rule: For numeric outputs in query class 1, always report currency, unit, and period with one verification sentence.
When discussing trend changes, provide both absolute and percentage deltas and cite source table/section context for 2.
Use conservative wording for forward-looking outputs: stated as estimate when assumptions are present (3).
Keep sign conventions consistent: positive operating inflows, negative outflows, and explicit basis (GAAP/non-GAAP) when metric is 4.
